title: IREN Announces Successful Energization of Sweetwater 1
text: IREN announced the successful energization of its 1.4GW Sweetwater 1 data center site in Texas. The announcement represents a major milestone for IREN's AI infrastructure expansion strategy. Sweetwater 1 marks the connection of the site's high-voltage substation to the ERCOT grid. Power delivery at Sweetwater 1 is expected to ramp progressively in line with the phased construction and commissioning of data centers at the site. This project is part of IREN's broader 2GW Sweetwater Hub strategy spanning 2,200 acres. The successful energization positions IREN to meet its growing AI infrastructure commitments, including the major Microsoft contract for GPU cloud services. This milestone demonstrates IREN's execution capability in scaling its data center infrastructure to support the rapidly growing demand for AI computing resources.
